reviews.review_description:
Update: nope, it only came 50% higher... I dont get why recentering does not work...


U sit on top of the cockpit, the steering wheel is at floor level. Recentering doesnt make it better. Only one option for music. No options for drivers position.
Not a bad game at all but might want to add some more levels as there is only three and also make the opponents faster,more crash realistics and longer trackes but not to bad.
the game is fun but you should make it so that you can change the ai difficulty and sometimes my steering will glitch out
